name: Split Pea Soup (Vegan) - Done in Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the split yellow peas overnight.
2. Bring to a boil and drain.
3. Wash the peas thoroughly, at least twice before adding them to the crockpot.
4. Add onions, carrots, scallions, and diced potatoes to the slow cooker.
5. Place the peas on top of the vegetables.
6. Toss in the remaining ingredients: garlic, soy sauce, curry powder, chili powder, and crushed red pepper.
7. Top off the crockpot with water.
8. Cook on high for 3-4 hours. Adjust seasonings as desired, using mace, turmeric, oregano, or a little sherry if preferred.
This recipe remains accurate to the original while improving clarity and consistency.
